examples: Haven't farsighted economists been telling us that in the future we will work less, not more?
His warnings on climate change proved farsighted, too.
Some growth stems from a commitment by governments and farsighted business to fund cleaner energy sources.
The move was particularly farsighted given that rates on high earners in California have since soared.
It is there, but farsighted statesmanship and the necessary political will are not--yet.
